_source: Reeds Nautical Almanac §9.23.30 Ría de Corme y Laxe, §9.23.31 Ría de Camariñas (user export). Coords/WPTs/facilities transcribed from the page; tide differences are vs Standard Port La Coruña.

areas.approachNote: From ría-entrance WPT 43°07'·27N 09°12'·65W: track 108°/1.1M then 039°/0.7M to Camariñas bkwtr (Reeds). Beware El Bufardo rk (awash) 4ca NW of C. Villano; pass E of Las Quebrantas shoal from N.
areas.accessNote: Good shelter; anchor N/NW of hbr except in E/NE'lies. Approach on 081°/108° leading lines (Reeds).

marina.name: Club Náutico de Camariñas (CNC)
marina.notes: Reeds: 60 berths + visitor on 3 YC pontoons, max 18m LOA, €1·82/m (fore & aft), Wi-Fi (limited range). VHF Ch 09. Buses to La Coruña; airport Santiago.

areas.approachNote: From ría-entrance WPT 43°07'·27N 09°12'·65W: 180°/0.9M to Muxía (Mugia) bkwtr (Reeds). Well sheltered except strong E/SE'lies; else anchor outside in lee of bkwtr.
areas.accessNote: Marina or anchor outside hbr in lee of bkwtr; exposed to strong E/SE'lies (Reeds).

marina.name: Marina Cataventos
marina.notes: Reeds: 232 berths inc visitor, max 22m LOA, €2·00/m (multihulls +50%), Wi-Fi. VHF Ch 09. mob +34 673168199 / 666369324. Buses to La Coruña; airport Santiago.

areas.name: Corme
areas.approachNote: From WPT 43°15'·31N 09°00'·63W: 081°/2.1M to Corme pierhead (Reeds). Beware rocks off Pta del Roncudo; avoid Bajo de La Avería (5·6m). Ría >2M wide.
areas.accessNote: Fishing-harbour refuge; well sheltered from N & E. Raft on FVs / anchor N of bkwtr in 5m, good holding. Can be bad in W–N swell.
areas.description: Small fishing village on the N side of the Ría de Corme y Laxe (Costa da Morte). Bolt-hole between Malpica and Camariñas. Fisherman Cofradía ☎ +34 981 738043, ~4t crane. Shops, fuel, water; buses to La Coruña.

areas.name: Laxe
areas.approachNote: From WPT 43°15'·31N 09°00'·63W: 166°/2.0M to Laxe pierhead (Reeds). Beware rocks off Pta de Laxe; avoid Bajo de La Avería (5·6m).
areas.accessNote: Anchor N of hbr bkwtr in 5m, good holding on sand. Well sheltered from W & S. Can be bad in W–N swell.
areas.description: Fishing village on the S side of the Ría de Corme y Laxe (Costa da Morte). Anchorage refuge. Fisherman Cofradía ☎ +34 981 728255, ~16t crane. Shops, fuel, water; buses to La Coruña.
